production_rollout_note: Confirm the target org release before changing project sourceApiVersion because Salesforce releases roll out by org and instance.
package_version_policy: Do not assume managed package versions from public docs. Inspect installed packages in the target org and use official package release notes only when available.
soap_login_policy: SOAP API login() is unavailable in API versions 65.0 and later. Salesforce has announced retirement for login() in SOAP API versions 31.0 through 64.0 with Summer '27.

sources.label: Salesforce Summer '26 SOAP API Release Notes
Salesforce API and Data Loader versions
